---
title: "Velogames: race reports"
subtitle: "Fantasy cycling retrospectives for the Dulwich league"
execute:
  freeze: false
---

A look back at each race in the season: who delivered, who disappointed, and what the perfect team would have been.

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

using Velogames, Dates

# Scan reports/ for generated .qmd files rather than the full archive
reports_dir = joinpath(@__DIR__, "reports")
report_files = isdir(reports_dir) ? filter(f -> endswith(f, ".qmd"), readdir(reports_dir)) : String[]

if isempty(report_files)
    println("No race reports generated yet. Run `julia --project scripts/render_reports.jl` to generate them.")
else
    # Parse slug and year from filenames like "omloop-het-nieuwsblad-2026.qmd"
    races = []
    for f in report_files
        m = match(r"^(.+)-(\d{4})\.qmd$", f)
        m === nothing && continue
        pcs_slug = String(m[1])
        year = parse(Int, m[2])
        ri = Velogames._find_race_by_slug(pcs_slug)
        name = ri !== nothing ? ri.name : replace(pcs_slug, "-" => " ") |> titlecase
        date_str = ri !== nothing ? replace(ri.date, r"^\d{4}" => string(year)) : "$year-01-01"
        push!(races, (name = name, date = date_str, year = year, filename = f))
    end

    # Sort by date
    sort!(races, by = r -> r.date)

    # Group by year, most recent first
    years = sort(unique(r.year for r in races), rev = true)
    for year in years
        year_races = filter(r -> r.year == year, races)
        println("## $year season\n")
        println("| Race | Date |")
        println("|------|------|")
        for r in year_races
            d = Date(r.date)
            date_display = Dates.format(d, "d U")
            link = "reports/$(replace(r.filename, ".qmd" => ".html"))"
            println("| [$(r.name)]($link) | $date_display |")
        end
        println()
    end
end
```
